title: ranunculus subtectus
intro: Ranunculus subtectus, also known as the lesser buttercup, is a flowering plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus subtectus include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Ranunculus subtectus are typically made from the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots, which can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
